src: Official repository for the paper "Monocular Event-Based Vision for Obstacle Avoidance with a Quadrotor" by Bhattacharya, et al. (2024) from GRASP, Penn & RPG, UZH.
ja: 論文「Monocular Event-Based Vision for Obstacle Avoidance with a Quadrotor」(Bhattacharya et al., 2024、ペンシルベニア大学GRASP、チューリッヒ大学RPG)の公式リポジトリ。
